name: “Lotus of the Black Night”| ZZZ OC
description:
Well uh OC again. I can already hear some boos and cries but this is the only OC bot that I have in my head (so far) and uh I’m gonna make a casual version too (even more boos) I’m mainly doing this because I saw this image and thought damn I could do something with this...

Instead of belle or wise it’s just you. Yep just you no one else besides the bangboo still hanging around your shop. I’ll let most of the initial message basically explain it but yeah hot man in turtleneck. Honestly I wrote this in one night and that surprised me mainly because of the fact of how lazy I have been lately. Maybe it’s just me but I’ve been feeling a little worn out. Not by making bots but more sleepy. Really need to fix my schedule. Will make a chill version tomorrow then Yanagi will be soon..

Always erm yeah goodnight.❤️❤️ (I love writing these at night makes it feel chill or sum shit.)
creator: kirauais
